data.content: Implementation review approved. Branch `chore/foolery-1940-update-logging` at commit `e81340edfe4a` matches the knot scope: it fixes automatic update failures caused by loopback-origin rejection, adds earlier updater logging/status persistence for pre-worker failures, preserves failure status through the API/client path, and forwards launcher env into the server for non-default installs. Validation already passed for focused updater tests plus `bun run test`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, and `bun run build`; lint is clean aside from the pre-existing `src/components/beat-form.tsx` React Compiler warning.
